3156680.name: Rules: Motel Horizon
3156680.description:
PROLOGUE

Congratulations!

You have been selected among many candidates and have been accepted for the position of Night Manager at the Horizon Motel!

Our driver will take you to the Motel office. You have 14 night shifts ahead of you. We have mandatory “Rules” that must be followed, no matter how strange or absurd they may seem.

You should know that not all the rules are known, and you will have to learn some of them yourself. Sometimes at the cost of their own lives. Always be careful and pay attention to any atypical things happening at the Horizon Motel.

Perform your direct duties as a motel Administrator: serve visitors, run errands, and keep things clean and tidy. But most importantly, FOLLOW the RULES!

In case something happens, we'll say so... We will hire another Night Manager who will do a better job in his assigned position.

Hold out for all shifts and find out what or who is behind the Horizon Motel.

Pss... Don't believe them! They're just pretending to be human!

KEY FEATURES

  • A large number of endings of the game

  • Different actions can have both positive and negative effects on gameplay.

  • Exploring visitors and the surrounding space using various devices opens up new possibilities in gameplay

  • An extensive system of dialogues with characters that has its own specifics and uniqueness

  • A wide range of character reactions to various player actions

  • Item management and trade with a Company representative

  • Participation in the activities of various factions, such as the Company, the Church and the Cult

  • A plot with roguelike elements

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
